final:
module adc_8bit (
    input [2:0] analog_input,
    output reg [7:0] digital_output
);
    always @(*) begin
        digital_output = {5'b00000, analog_input}; // Extend 3-bit input to 8-bit output
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      digital_output <= {3'b111, ~analog_input};
    end
  end

endmodule
